A diversidade não é uma visão do futuro ou algo que desejamos ter um dia, é um valor inegociável de quem somos. Nossas diferenças são o que nos tornam únicos, por isso respeitamos uns aos outros e acreditamos na igualdade de oportunidades para todos. Description:
incaseof.law End-to-End Forderungsmanagement: volldigitalisiert, transparent und kundenorientiert.

Warum incaseof.law?

incaseof.law bietet vollautomatische Fallanlagen, personalisierte Inkassoschreiben und transparentes Reporting. Genießen Sie Automatisierung, Echtzeit-Statusberichte und automatisch erstellte Rechtsdokumente ohne rechtliches Vorwissen. Unser Anwaltsmatching und die Integration in den Elektronischen Rechtsverkehr runden unser Angebot ab.

Unsere USPs:

 Vollautomatische Fallanlage: Zeitersparnis durch Automatisierung per Dokumenten-Upload oder REST API.
 Personalisierte Inkassoschreiben: Anpassbare Kommunikation und Upselling-Möglichkeiten.
 Transparentes Reporting: Echtzeit-Statusberichte und fundierte Entscheidungen.
 Automatisierte Rechtsdokumente: Erstellung ohne juristische Kenntnisse.
 Anwaltsmatching: Effizientes Matching mit qualifizierten Anwälten.
 Digitale Rechtskommunikation: Reibungslose Kommunikation im ERV.
 Vollständige Zahlungsabwicklung: Kostenlose Servicierung außergerichtlich und in nicht anwaltspflichtigen Fällen.
 Reduktion des administrativen Aufwands: Entlastung interner Abteilungen.

Pains und Gains:

 Pains: Hohe Nichtzahlungsquote, Bedarf an Automatisierung, zu viele dezentrale Stakeholder.
 Gains: Optimierter Cashflow, Effizienzsteigerung, Echtzeit-Transparenz, verbesserte Liquiditätsplanung, Entlastung interner Ressourcen, Förderung der digitalen Transformation.

 Vereinbaren Sie jetzt ein 30-minütiges Telefonat und entdecken Sie, wie incaseof.law Ihr Forderungsmanagement revolutionieren kann.

Somos una compañía BPO que trabaja con el respaldo de bancos, compañías financieras, empresas de servicios públicos, retailers y comerciales, con carteras de créditos en mora que requieran un recupero ágil, dinámico, profesional y fundamentalmente con la mayor seguridad en todas las etapas de la morosidad (temprana a judicial).

Nuestras Ventajas:
- Aplicación de business intelligence y analytics a las estrategias de gestión.
- Sistemas creados inhouse por expertos en cobranzas, preparados para el control de performance de cartera y de la gestión de asesores en tiempo real.
- Gestión exhaustiva a través de diversos canales (automático, negociación telefónica, visitas de campo y envío de cartas) hasta lograr el cobro.
- Análisis de los datos de contacto recibidos, enriquecimiento y skip tracing con bases internas y externas y normalización de los registros.
- Comunicación cordial pero firme y trato cuidado a deudores tendientes a su recuperación como cliente.
- Devolución de las causas de la morosidad, como imput valioso para la posterior comercialización de productos por parte de la entidad cliente.

CONCEPTOS QUE IDENTIFICAN EL SERVICIO
Somos una empresa ORIENTADA A RESULTADOS y apalancamos nuestro servicio en la CELERIDAD, PROFESIONALISMO, CALIDAD E INNOVACIÓN para crear estrategias inteligentes y particulares para cada cartera y así generar acciones específicas con el fin de obtener resultados positivos rápidamente.

Name: Société de Recouvrement des Créances
Description:
La Société de Recouvrement des Créances (SRC), a pour missions essentielles : la liquidation à l’amiable des actifs et passifs de tout établissement public de crédit à elle confiée par l’autorité de tutelle, la liquidation du fonds de commerce de tout établissement de crédit qui lui est confiée par la COBAC ; la liquidation judiciaire du patrimoine de tout établissement de crédit qui lui est confiée par les tribunaux et cours ; le recouvrement des créances douteuses et litigieuses et/ou contentieuses détenues par les institutions financières publiques sur demande.

La Société de Recouvrement des Créances (SRC) peut étendre ses activités à toutes opérations de recouvrement qui lui sont confiées par des entreprises non financières du secteur public ou par des entreprises financières ou non des secteurs parapublic et privé.
A cela il faut ajouter l’indemnisation des épargnants des banques en liquidation et la gestion du patrimoine immobilier des banques en liquidation.

Name: Bizzon
Description:
Bizzon: be surprised by our results.

Getting loyal customers to pay their invoices is delicate and there are always nicer or more pressing matters to be done.

That's why Bizzon specialized in the humane yet determined collection of all your invoices that are hard to collect. We go through the same procedures even for the smaller amounts.

Our first focus is on obtaining payment, the second on maintaining the relationship with the client. Through a fixed and affordable business package, you ensure you get the services of a dedicated lawyer and a transparent follow-up structure, and all without advance billing or court fees.

The surprise at Bizzon is in the results, not the costs. You can also follow the status of your case through our digital platform. You will be able to see that we work in a transparent way: our professional staff will approach your debtor in a friendly but assertive manner by sending a maximum of two letters, making a few phone calls, involving our permanent collection lawyer if needed, a subpoena, the legal procedure, the judgment and the payment. For our loyal clients, we introduced a maximum amount for bailiff's fees when your debtor unexpectedly fails.

Name: Pró-Credor
Description:
A Pró-Credor é uma empresa de Cobrança especializada em Investigação Patrimonial, criada com a missão de recuperar ativos ocultos em casos de insolvência ficta de alta complexidade, com propósito de ajudar Credores e Advogados a superarem o temido “ganha, mas não leva" nos Processos Judiciais.

Somos uma Equipe multidisciplinar altamente qualificada, formada por profissionais com aptidão inata em inteligência investigativa, dedicados à coleta e produção de provas, com o objetivo de assegurar a satisfação do crédito exequendo.

Atuamos na transformação de dados em provas concretas, devidamente estruturados e analisados, para a caracterização de abuso da personalidade jurídica, grupos econômicos de direito ou de fato, sucessões empresariais, atos simulados, dilapidações patrimoniais, identificações das interpostas pessoas, localizações dos domicílios dos executados, fraudes aos credores, fraudes à execução, crimes falimentares, entre outros atos ilícitos praticados por executados e recuperandas litigantes de má-fé.

A Pró-Credor realiza pesquisas de campo e se conecta com diversos órgãos e instituições, como Cartórios Extrajudiciais, Cartórios das Varas Judiciais, Centrais de Mandados, Oficiais de Justiça, Ouvidorias dos Tribunais de Justiça, Corregedorias Estaduais de Justiça, Corregedoria Nacional de Justiça, Ministérios Públicos, Delegacias Especializadas, Operadores do Direito, Corregedorias da OAB, entre outros, promovendo um Processo mais justo e humano.

Estamos constantemente atualizados com as melhores técnicas e ferramentas públicas e privadas, com o objetivo de apresentar por meio do dossiê Inventário de Provas, o mais adequado conjunto probatório para aplicação das Informações, Percepções e Estratégias.

Realizamos por meio da Gestão de Processo Extrajudicial, de forma proativa, a coleta e produção de novas provas, que são aplicadas com inteligência ao longo da persecução patrimonial, adequando as estratégias para viabilizar um Processo célere e efetivo.

Name: Opal Fee Recovery
Description:
Opal Fee Recovery has been established by a team of recruitment company owners and legal experts with years of experience in successfully recovering many hundreds of thousands of pounds in disputed fees for our own businesses.

We possess extensive experience encompassing a wide array of scenarios, affording us a profound understanding of effective fee recovery strategies.

Our comprehensive exposure to diverse recruitment fee disputes equips us with the expertise to adeptly address various objections and challenges, extending beyond conventional excuses for not paying or avoiding payment of a fee – including:

* Back-door hires
* Candidates who were engaged but did not work out
* Engagements several months after the introduction
* Multiple introductions of a candidate by different agencies
* Denying any contract exists
* Sometimes just blatantly ignoring requests for payment!

You name it we’ve probably seen and it and we have achieved extremely high recovery success rates.

Our experience has also taught us that getting the right Terms of Business and systems in place is critical to good fee recovery and we want to share that knowledge with other recruitment businesses, to maximise fee recovery and minimise the risk of future disputes.

Name: RecoverSmart
Description:
At RecoverSmart, we understand from personal experience that dealing with insurance companies can be a headache. If insurance companies have to pay to repair your vehicle, they will refer you to one of their partnered or preferred repairers. Whilst this is necessarily not a problem, the respective repairer is usually under contract with the insurance company to repair your vehicle at minimal cost.

Cost cutting and vehicle repairs often result in unsatisfactory outcomes. This can have short and long term ramifications to your vehicle. At RecoverSmart, we constantly strive to ensure your vehicle is repaired to pre-accident condition. This is at a smash repairer of your choice. Alternatively we could recommend a repairer that can guarantee quality work.
Unlike insurance companies, at RecoverSmart, we are constantly striving to provide simple and efficient services to our customers. If you are involved in an accident, simply fill out our ‘online accident details form’ and we will respond within a 24 hour time frame to confirm approval (meaning the other party has accepted liability for the accident).

Following approval of the claim, our independent assessor will assess the damage(s) to your vehicle. To uphold customer satisfaction, we assess the vehicle with the repairer’s quote of your choice. Following assessment, repairs to your vehicle are undertaken immediately. After all repairs are finalised, your vehicle will be ready to be collected and RecoverSmart will begin the recovery process with the respective insurance company.

To maximise your experience with RecoverSmart, we charge no fees to the client. RecoverSmart upholds a ‘no-win, no-fee’ basis, and we charge the repairer the fees for the recovery unless your vehicle is a total loss.

Também contamos com um time jurídico experiente e uma rede de parceiros em comarcas de todo o país.

Nosso propósito é ir além da cobrança: buscamos soluções eficientes, éticas e personalizadas que tragam tranquilidade financeira para nossos clientes. Com mais de uma década de atuação, seguimos com a missão de transformar desafios financeiros em oportunidades de crescimento para empresas de todos os portes.

Name: Acquire Marketplace
Description:
The ARM space is robust and full of opportunity. Acquire is the only platform built specifically for it.

Unlock hidden opportunities in the ARM market not listed publicly!

Reach the entire industry and beyond, instead of relying on your network!

Built by Collectors, for Collectors

At Acquire Marketplace, our story began with a simple goal: after decades of leading and modernizing the collections industry, we wanted to acquire an agency of our own.

What we discovered was a broken system — limited visibility, few qualified connections, and an uneven playing field for smaller agencies that make up the majority of the market. Traditional channels couldn’t deliver, and even our deep industry networks only went so far.

So, we built the solution ourselves.

We combined our experience, technology, and insight to create a confidential, data-driven marketplace where serious buyers and sellers can connect directly — efficiently, transparently, and with integrity.

Today, Acquire Marketplace is transforming how collection agencies buy and sell, providing visibility, structure, and trust to an industry ready for change.

Name: Richard James & Associates
Description:
Founded in 2005, Richard James & Associates (RJA) stands out in the competitive commercial collections industry by focusing on working not only harder but also smarter for our clients. As a one-stop solution for commercial debt recovery, we leverage a nationwide network of highly trained private investigators and attorneys certified by the Commercial Law League of America.

Our experienced collection team is second to none, and our commitment to a "never give up" approach has helped us achieve one of the highest collection yields in the industry. If one collector isn’t able to recover your account, we’ll assign two, three, or even four more until every stone is turned over. Working strictly on contingency, you only pay for results.

Additionally, we partner with our clients to enhance their internal processes, helping reduce future problem accounts before they surface.

Ready to see how our relentless approach can make a difference? Contact us today, and let’s maximize your collection results together.

Description:
Izterjava d.o.o. ponuja cenovno in časovno najboljši način poplačila odprtih terjatev. Z 20-letnimi izkušnjami imamo izpopolnjen proces izterjave, ki zajema

- izvensodno 
- sodno izterjavo
- detektivsko poizvedovanje 
- odvzem predmetov. 

Celoten proces je podprt z interno razvito aplikacijo, ki nudi naročniku 24/7 vpogled v stanje terjatev. 

 Z 1mio+ terjatev našo kvaliteto jamčimo z geslom, da račun izstavimo le v primeru uspešne izterjave. 

Ključ do uspeha v izterjavi sta hitro ukrepanje in kvaliteta informacij - smo edini na slovenskem trgu, ki svoj proces izterjave podpiramo z detektivskimi ekipami na terenu. S pravilno poizvedbo o dolžnikih se naš naročnik izogne nesmotrnim stroškom izterjave.

Built by Collectors, for Collectors

At Acquire Marketplace, our story began with a simple goal: after decades of leading and modernizing the collections industry, we wanted to acquire an agency of our own.

What we discovered was a broken system — limited visibility, few qualified connections, and an uneven playing field for smaller agencies that make up the majority of the market. Traditional channels couldn’t deliver, and even our deep industry networks only went so far.

So, we built the solution ourselves.

We combined our experience, technology, and insight to create a confidential, data-driven marketplace where serious buyers and sellers can connect directly — efficiently, transparently, and with integrity.

Today, Acquire Marketplace is transforming how collection agencies buy and sell, providing visibility, structure, and trust to an industry ready for change.

We work at the intersection of technology, anthropology, cultural preservation, and planetary consciousness, engaging with leading organizations, ambassadors, and communities around the world. Every partnership and project is approached with unwavering responsibility, transparency, and respect for the sacred nature of this work.

Our Services:

Artifact Stewardship & Preservation - Ethical protection and long-term stewardship of culturally and spiritually significant artifacts.

Cultural & Historical Research - Interdisciplinary research bridging archaeology, anthropology, and ancient wisdom traditions.

Educational Programs & Workshops - Curated learning experiences designed to expand understanding of global heritage and conscious history.

Media & Content Development - Production of documentaries, publications, and educational media grounded in truth and integrity.

Collaboration & Partnerships - Strategic alliances with organizations aligned in stewardship, sustainability, and planetary service.

Technology & Security Advisory - Guidance on blockchain, cybersecurity, and digital integrity solutions that safeguard sacred data.

Ambassador & Community Engagement - Support and coordination for ambassadors who amplify awareness and build cross-cultural bridges.

Spiritual & Ethical Consulting - Integrity-based advisory for individuals and organizations working with heritage, consciousness, or sacred stewardship missions.

Connect with Artifact Guardians:
For partnership inquiries, educational collaborations, media requests, or stewardship initiatives, please contact us at contact@artifactguardians.org

Name: Sell Collection Agency
Description:
LOOKING TO SELL AN AGENCY?
We can help sell a collection agency business!

Our mission is to empower collection agency owners to maximize the value of their business and transition smoothly to the next chapter. Through our specialized expertise, personalized guidance, and unwavering commitment to integrity, we provide the strategic resources needed to ensure a successful sale and a lasting legacy for every agency owner we serve. We will help you sell a collection agency.

We’re not private equity, and we’re not a big corporation. We’re a team of experienced professionals, ready to personally guide your legacy into the future and help you sell a collection agency.

We understand how important your business is to you. Whether you’re an owner considering selling, or a broker representing one, we’re here to offer a personalized and thoughtful acquisition approach—no middlemen, no conglomerates, no corporate pressure. Just a friendly conversation about what works best for you and your team.  We can help you sell an agency.

We believe that every business has value, regardless of current profit margins or cash flow. Whether your company is operating with high profitability, low margins, or even negative income, we are genuinely interested in starting a conversation and helping you sell a collection agency.

For businesses facing cash flow challenges or generating little to no income, we offer tailored pricing solutions based on your current portfolio and forward flow inventory. Our goal is to create mutually beneficial opportunities that reflect the real potential of your company’s assets and future performance.

Nel 2012 con l’entrata di un nuovo socio di maggioranza ottiene l’iscrizione all’Albo dei Gestori dell’Accertamento e della Riscossione dei Tributi Locali (iscrizione n. 175 dell’Albo degli Agenti ex art. 53 d.lgs. n. 446/1997) e vede qualificati i propri servizi con la certificazione UNI EN ISO 9001:2008.

Name: Mudrawala Consultancy Services Private Limited
Description:
Mudrawala Consultancy Services Private Limited is a tech-enabled debt recovery agency specialising in retail, rural and semi-urban portfolios. Originating in 2012 as Shri Shanker Associates and formally incorporated in 2021, Mudrawala has evolved into a trusted recovery partner for leading banks, NBFCs and financial institutions across North India.

With a strong workforce of 350+ IIBF-certified professionals, we bring together deep field expertise, compliant recovery processes and data-driven investigation tools to deliver high-resolution outcomes. Our approach prioritises dignity, transparency and strict adherence to regulatory standards in every customer interaction.

Over the years, Mudrawala has built one of the widest operational networks in the region, with active recovery operations in every district and tehsil of Uttar Pradesh, and expanding coverage across Uttarakhand and Rajasthan. This extensive presence enables responsive, efficient and high-quality recovery execution at scale.

Our performance has been consistently recognised with multiple awards, including “Best Recovery Agency in Rural Sector” (2013, 2015, 2018, 2021, 2022, 2024) and “Excellence in Performance” for credit card collections in 2024.

Today, Mudrawala stands as a benchmark for ethical, technology-driven and result-oriented debt recovery solutions in India.

Name: cabinet de recouvrement Maroc CRM
Description:
Recouvrement amiable : Le cabinet tente d'établir un contact avec le débiteur afin de trouver une solution à l'amiable pour le paiement de la dette.

Recouvrement judiciaire : Si le recouvrement amiable échoue, le cabinet peut entamer des procédures judiciaires pour récupérer la dette, telles que l'émission de mises en demeure, le dépôt de requêtes devant les tribunaux, ou la saisie des biens du débiteur.

Enquêtes financières : Le cabinet peut réaliser des enquêtes financières pour évaluer la solvabilité des débiteurs et déterminer les meilleures approches pour récupérer les sommes dues.

Gestion des impayés : Le cabinet peut aider les entreprises à mettre en place des processus et des stratégies efficaces pour gérer les impayés et limiter les risques de non-paiement à l'avenir.

Conseils et formations : Certains cabinets offrent des services de conseil et de formation aux entreprises pour les aider à améliorer leurs processus de recouvrement et à mieux gérer les créances clients.

Name: Guta Consultoria e Cobranças

Fundada em 2021, a Guta é uma empresa especializada na otimização de custos internos e na recuperação de ressarcimento e cobranças para empresas de consignado, recuperação de crédito, seguros, proteção veicular, transportadoras e locadoras de veículos. Nosso objetivo é aumentar a eficiência das empresas na recuperação de valores dispendidos, proporcionando mais autonomia e resultados expressivos.

A Guta nasceu de uma conversa entre amigos, quando Tácio Rodrigues, administrador de empresas e com MBA em Finanças pela FGV, identificou uma grande oportunidade de melhorar os serviços de ressarcimento e cobranças no mercado. Com mais de 11 anos de experiência em tecnologia, Tácio criou a Guta com foco em tecnologia, agilidade e atendimento personalizado.

Nosso diferencial está na abordagem tecnológica e moderna, utilizando soluções eficientes que garantem agilidade nos processos e resultados rápidos. Trabalhamos com um time altamente capacitado, comprometido em oferecer o melhor atendimento e soluções práticas para nossos clientes.

Valores fundamentais:

Ética: Transparência e honestidade em todas as ações.

Responsabilidade: Compromisso com os resultados e autonomia dos nossos clientes.

Inovação: Busca constante por novas soluções tecnológicas.

Excelência no Atendimento: Atendimento ágil, personalizado e focado nas necessidades do cliente.

Com um time experiente e comprometido, a Guta está pronta para enfrentar os desafios do mercado e se consolidar como referência em recuperação de valores e cobranças, sempre com transparência, confiança e eficiência.

Dans le monde complexe des affaires, avoir des conseils juridiques fiables et précis est essentiel pour la sécurité et la conformité de votre entreprise.

Blue Risk Unit est une agence spécialisée dans la gestion des risques clients, le recouvrement de créances, l’accompagnement d’affaires, le conseil juridique et les négociations de contrats. L’Expertise des Juristes de Blue Risk Unit
Domaines du Droit Couvert

Les juristes de Blue Risk Unit sont spécialisés dans plusieurs domaines du droit, notamment :

Droit des affaires : Conseils sur les transactions commerciales, la gouvernance d’entreprise et les fusions et acquisitions.
Droit du travail : Assistance en matière de contrats de travail, litiges entre employeurs et employés, et conformité aux réglementations du travail.
Droit civil : Conseils sur les litiges civils, les contrats civils et les questions de responsabilité civile.
Droit pénal : Représentation et conseils en cas de litiges pénaux impliquant l’entreprise.
Recherche et Interprétation de la Législation

Les juristes de Blue Risk Unit effectuent une recherche approfondie et interprètent la législation, la jurisprudence et d’autres sources du droit pertinentes pour encadrer les activités de l’entreprise. Cela permet de fournir des conseils juridiques précis et adaptés aux besoins spécifiques de chaque client.

Possuindo uma estrutura alicerçada em Tecnologia de Ponta e Processos flexíveis, atuando com excelência em toda a cadeia de recuperação de crédito.

Dabei sind wir u.a. auch auf Kleinst-Forderungen (z.B. für den Handel, Online-Shops oder Sanitätshäuser) spezialisiert, die viele Unternehmen häufig einfach abschreiben, weil ihnen der Aufwand für das Einfordern offener Beträge unter 10,00 Euro zu hoch ist.

UNSERE INKASSO-LEISTUNGEN
Wir bearbeiten alle Ihre aktuellen Forderungen, auch Kleinstforderungen (unter 50 €) sowie alle Rückläufer, die bis dato noch nicht verjährt sind und / oder die schon bearbeitet wurden – rein erfolgsbasiert!  Für Sie ohne Kostenrisiko.
* vorgerichtlich
* gerichtlich
* nachgerichtlich

SERVICES AUCH FÜR IHR MAHNWESEN
Wenn Sie sich nur um Ihre Rechnungen kümmern wollen, dann übernehmen wir auf Wunsch bereits das komplette Mahnwesen für Sie. Und zwar ab der ersten Mahnung. Natürlich auch hier völlig kosten- und risikofrei für Sie!

FUNDIERTE BERATUNG FÜR RECHNUNGSPROZESSE
Mit Ihnen gemeinsam schauen wir uns den gesamten Prozess des Rechnungslaufes an und optimieren diesen, wo es möglich ist. So sind Ihre Prozesse stets schlank und minimal zeitaufwändig.
Damit kein Geld mehr verloren geht und Ihre Mitarbeiter wertschöpfend eingesetzt werden können.

WIR ENTLASTEN SIE IN VIELERLEI HINSICHT
Und wir arbeiten komplett erfolgsorientiert. D.h. nach Abgabe der Forderungen an uns werden wir Sie nicht mehr behelligen. Und zwar bis die jeweilige Akte geschlossen wird. Daher ersparen wir Ihnen viel Zeit, da Rückfragen überflüssig sind. Sie werden durch uns als Dienstleister nicht aus dem Tagesgeschäft rausgerissen. Intern entsteht somit möglichst wenig Aufwand in einer Zusammenarbeit mit uns.

Name: Morgan, Cohen & Bach - B2B Debt Collections

Morgan Cohen & Bach - The Quickest Collection Agency in the Market, Guaranteed**

Morgan Cohen & Bach is not just a collection agency, we are a fast-track to recovering your outstanding receivables, redefining the boundaries of speed and efficiency in debt collection. 

With the boast of successfully handling over 500k accounts, our proven methodology converts receivables into cash within an impressive average of 27 days, setting us apart in the industry as the quickest collection agency. 

We're not just fast - we guarantee it. Our unique 60-Day Guarantee asserts our commitment to your financial recovery. If we are unable to collect within 60 days, not only do we waive our fees, but we also take it a step further - we pay another agency or law firm if they succeed in collecting where we couldn't. Yes, you read that right, we put our money where our mouth is because your success is our ultimate goal. 

Speed is not something we stumbled upon; it was forged in the furnace of necessity, as we pushed ourselves to collect from businesses that had shuttered. This baptism by fire has transformed us into an agency that thrives on speed and efficiency, ensuring your funds are recovered as swiftly as possible.

We take pride in our network of professional alliances that bolster our capabilities, with over 170 attorney partnerships and 300 private investigators nationwide. This extensive infrastructure amplifies our reach and capacity, enabling us to operate seamlessly across all 50 states. 

Our credentials include servicing seven Fortune 500 clients, a testament to the trust and confidence placed in our services by some of the world's largest corporations. 

Our journey is not just about us, it's about you too. We invite you to share in our story and confidence, and allow us to retrieve your money swiftly and securely. 

Choose Morgan Cohen and Bach - because when it comes to debt recovery, every second counts.

O crescimento e as atualizações ocorridos constantemente no mercado, geraram a necessidade na busca por empresas que nos possibilitam prestar um serviço de qualidade e agilidade, à fim de aprimorar nosso sistema de cobrança, gerando maior credibilidade e aumento na produtividade, causando maior satisfação de nossos clientes.

Empresa de cobrança Grupo Cobratec desde 1987.
Location: São José dos Campos, São Paulo

Name: Stuart-Lippman and Associates, Inc.
Description:
Stuart-Lippman and Associates, Inc., founded in 1982, is a founding CCAA Certified collection agency that provides innovative nationwide collection, investigation, and litigation services to some of our nation’s largest companies with programs created exclusively for:

We are committed to setting the standard by which all recovery services are measured. We offer a dynamic alternative that is grounded on a strong knowledge of how to affect recovery and that is what makes us stand apart. 

One of a handful of SSAE18 SOC II certified commercial collection agencies, Stuart-Lippman provides independently certified unrivaled data security, compliance, privacy, and recoveries for industry leading clients.

The International Association of Commercial Collectors 
The American Collectors Association 
The American Bar Association Fidelity & Surety Law Committee 
The American Surety Association 
The Association of Certified Fraud Examiners 
The National Bond Claims Association 
The Turnaround Management Association 
Independent Insurance Agents & Brokers of America 

Our dynamic recovery alternative is grounded on knowledge, and that is what makes us stand apart.

For further information contact:
Dan Traynor, General Sales Manager dan.traynor@stuartlippman.com 
(800) 880-5400 ext 7709

Name: C&L Debt Collection Services
Description:
C&L Debt Collection Services is dedicated to maintaining this leadership by adhering to the "No Collection No Fee Policy," which states that we will not charge any money from the client unless we collect. We are always investing in our people and technology and the ever-changing development of collecting solutions. As a full-service debt collection agency, we serve commercial clients nationwide.

At C&L Debt Collection Services, we are committed to high standards and are driven to recover your money as quickly as possible. In today's fast-paced commercial environment, you need efficient collections of your receivables. Fast and effective collection can be critical to your company's success. Our expertise and professionalism can bring results without compromising your current business operations and relationships.

When we represent you, you understand that we are an extension of your company and that our objective and vision is to maintain a great working relationship with your debtors. The company will work responsibly and positively to optimize returns while facing common problems with debt collection. Still, we are also concerned with maintaining and influencing the well-being of our clients and their businesses. Our ethics are in place so that we can collect debts and judgments while protecting your best interests.

Nossos serviços incluem negociação de dívidas, análise financeira, consultoria especializada e gestão de recebíveis. Comprometidos com a segurança e a transparência, garantimos um atendimento humanizado e resultados comprovados. Entre em contato para saber mais sobre como podemos ajudar sua empresa a recuperar créditos de forma eficiente e segura.

Name: Solfinexc
Description:
Solfinexc est une société spécialisée dans les solutions financières et l'excellence opérationnelle. Notre expertise se déploie dans le recouvrement de créances et le conseil en gestion, avec pour objectif d’optimiser la performance financière de nos clients, grâce à des solutions sur mesure.

Concernant le recouvrement des créances, Solfinexc propose trois offres adaptées à vos besoins :

1) La Gestion à la demande par dossier de créances. 
Vous ciblez une créance particulière ou un ensemble de créances pour une prise en charge rapide et efficace.

2) La gestion du portefeuille de clients. 
Vous nous confiez la gestion du recouvrement amiable de vos créances sur un portefeuille de clients concernés. Nous menons les actions pour vous avec une approche stratégique afin de maximiser vos résultats.

3) Le crédit management. 
Nous assurons le pilotage complet de votre recouvrement en endossant le rôle de Crédit Manager, avec pour objectif prioritaire la réduction de votre DSO (Days Sales Outstanding, ou délai moyen de paiement).

Pour le Conseil en Gestion, nous accompagnons les entreprises dans l’amélioration continue de leurs processus internes, principalement au sein des fonctions supports.

Pourquoi choisir Solfinexc ?

Choisir Solfinexc, c'est maximiser vos encaissements, sécuriser votre trésorerie et garantir l'efficacité opérationnelle de vos processus internes.

Contactez-nous à l’adresse suivante : contact@solfinexc.fr

Name: Marcantica
Description:
Welcome to Marcantica Comm. V. , Authentic Ancient Coins and artifacts, run by Marc De Cock, located in Flanders, Belgium.

I am an avid collector and the interest in coin collecting goes back to my childhood, which eventually evolved into collecting Roman Coins in 1983.

I am a member of the “Koninklijke Maatschappij Numismatica Brugge en Het Vrije”, an assosiation of the “Europees Genootschap voor Munt- en Penningkunde” in Belgium.   

You can buy with confidence; I am interested in making long-term customers. I have sold successfully worldwide. My goal is to serve the numismatic community, for new and experienced collector alike, striving to offer quality numismatics at reasonable prices. Most coins are listed with references, grade, condition description, weight, diameter, mint authority and location, date and complete obverse and reverse descriptions. 

I work together with consigners from Belgium, France, Italy, Bulgaria,... orders will be sent from those countries with the same guarantees!

Finally:

I hope to earn your confidence and become your favourite source for ancient coins. 

Thanks for visiting my shop.

Marc De Cock
Marcantica CommV

Name: Straetus West-Twente
Description:
Ben jij al actief met jouw debiteurenbeheer en het verbeteren van je cashflow?

Straetus is gespecialiseerd in het voorkomen en/of oplossen van betalingsachterstanden. Of het nu gaat om 1 factuur per jaar of 100 per week. Ons doel is om van elke wanbetaler een goed betalende klant te maken en dat doen wij op een klantvriendelijke manier met onderstaande diensten. Wij onderscheiden ons met onze landelijke dekking, regionale binding en onze kernwaarden: persoonlijk, transparant en ondernemend.

 Debiteurenbeheer
Omdat het innen van vorderingen voor Straetus core business is, kunnen wij zeer effectief opereren. Het versturen van herinneringen, het nabellen en aanmanen verloopt via vaste protocollen. Indien nodig kan Straetus direct een incassotraject opstarten. Hierdoor heb jij er geen omkijken naar en kun je via een online portal de vorderingen volgen.
✓ Verlaging van administratieve werkdruk
✓ Vergroten van beschikbaar werkkapitaal
✓ Vermindering van oninbare vorderingen
✓ Behoud van klantrelatie door klantvriendelijke benadering van jouw debiteur

 Servicecontract
Begeleiding aan ondernemers en organisaties gedurende een langere periode. Straetus kan advies geven over debiteurenbeheer, informeren over ontwikkelingen op het gebied van wet- en regelgeving en daadkrachtig optreden indien er sprake is van onbetaalde facturen. Hiervoor hebben wij een aanbod in de vorm van een servicecontract.

✓ Adviesgesprek(ken) over debiteurenbeheer
✓ Dossiers indienen zonder kosten (geen succes, geen kosten)
✓ rapport kredietwaardigheid klant of prospect
✓ toegang tot jaarlijkse seminars
✓ Online inzicht in lopende dossiers
✓ 1e lijn juridische helpdesk
✓ 2 x per maand afrekening van ontvangen gelden

 Overige diensten
Ook kun jij bij Straetus terecht voor incidentele zaken. Denk hierbij aan;
✓ Enkele vordering indienen
✓ laatste aanmaningen
✓ kredietrapporten
✓ factoring

Name: inkas by mediserv
Description:
Die inkas ist ein spezialisierter Inkassodienstleister für Schweizer KMU. Als Marke der mediserv AG, einem etablierten Schweizer Unternehmen mit über 40 Jahren Erfahrung im Forderungsmanagement, bieten wir einen modernen, transparenten und erfolgsbasierten Inkassoservice – ohne Abogebühren, ohne Risiko.
Unsere Dienstleistungen richten sich an kleine und mittlere Unternehmen in allen Branchen, die Wert auf eine faire und effiziente Lösung bei offenen Forderungen legen. Mit einem klar strukturierten Prozess, persönlicher Betreuung und einem digitalen Kundenportal bieten wir maximale Transparenz und Entlastung im Inkassoprozess.

Heute vertrauen uns bereits über 4'500 Unternehmen in der Schweiz, wenn es darum geht, Zahlungsausfälle zu vermeiden und die eigene Liquidität zu sichern. Unsere Kunden profitieren von direkter Fallübermittlung, rechtlicher Expertise, automatisierten Abläufen und einem erfolgsbasierten Preismodell – bezahlt wird nur bei erfolgreicher Realisierung.

Täglich stehen wir in Kontakt mit unterschiedlichsten Situationen. Wir hören zu, klären auf und handeln lösungsorientiert – immer im Einklang mit den Werten unseres Unternehmens: Respekt, Transparenz und Verlässlichkeit.

Unser Ziel ist es, als langfristiger Partner zum wirtschaftlichen Erfolg unserer Kunden beizutragen – mit einem Inkassoservice, der nicht nur Forderungen eintreibt, sondern auch Vertrauen schafft.

Name: Kronan Inkasso
Description:
OM KRONAN INKASSO
Få in pengarna snabbare och behåll kunderna.
Vi skapar personliga relationer genom att vara tillgängliga, lyhörda och genom att ha din affär i fokus.

Våra medarbetare har lång erfarenhet av inkasso ärenden. Vi ser alltid till våra kunders och deras slutkunders behov och skräddarsyr en lösning som passar dig, ditt företag och din bransch. Att få betalt och samtidigt behålla en bra kundrelation är inte alltid lätt, men viktigt. 

Med målinriktad fordringshantering kan företag och tjänsteleverantörer undvika finansiella förluster och påskynda avkastningsflödet. Det säkrar likviditeten, ökar utrymmet för investeringar och stöder utvecklingen av nya internationella marknader. Vi ser till att pengarna kommer in kort och gott, på ett professionellt och tydligt vis.

Name: Bohemia Faktoring, a.s.
Description:
Bohemia Faktoring, a.s. je ryze česká společnost, která se od roku 2006 specializuje na odkup, správu a vymáhání pohledávek po splatnosti. Naším cílem je efektivní a zároveň korektní řešení závazků mezi věřitelem a dlužníkem, s důrazem na individuální přístup, transparentnost a dodržování právních i etických standardů.

Spolupracujeme s významnými partnery z oblasti finančních služeb, energetiky, telekomunikací a veřejné správy. Zabýváme se pohledávkami jak vůči fyzickým, tak i právnickým osobám. Pracujeme s důrazem na komunikaci, prevenci dalšího zadlužení a hledání reálných řešení, která jsou dlouhodobě udržitelná pro obě strany.

Dlužníkům nabízíme možnost vstřícné domluvy, rozumného splátkového kalendáře i odborné poradenství. Věřitelům poskytujeme komplexní správu portfolií pohledávek a právní podporu při vymáhání. Využíváme moderní nástroje řízení pohledávek a zajišťujeme vysokou úroveň zabezpečení dat i komunikace.

Bohemia Faktoring, a.s. je zapsaná v seznamu České národní banky a je členem Asociace inkasních agentur. Zakládáme si na profesionálním přístupu, důvěře a dlouhodobé spolupráci.

Na českém finančním trhu působí společnost již od roku 2005. 

Svou činností dlouhodobě usiluje o budování pozitivního vztahu s klienty, poskytování kvalitních finančních služeb a udržení dobrého jména společnosti. 

Bohemia Faktoring, a.s. je dlouhodobě zaměřená na poskytování splátkových dohod u portfolií, která spravuje.

Description:

Name: George Y. Yiangou (I.D.R.) LTD
Description:
For more than 40 years George Y. Yiangou (I.D.R) Ltd has been providing exclusive services in the field of International and Local Debt Recovery and has built along the way trusting relationships with its associates. 
The firm’s head office is situated in Nicosia, a major business center of Cyprus while we also maintain an office in Athens. Our personnel are comprised of multilingual experienced debt collectors trained to negotiate with the debtors to obtain payment proposals and find acceptable debt collection solutions to disputes or misunderstandings that may exist between the relevant parties.
We aim at finding solutions for our clients and providing customized advice. This may include as a last resort legal advice and litigation services. Our in-house lawyers have long experience in solving debt collection cases that are impossible to solve through conventional methods. In addition to this, we have also established a network of International lawyers worldwide ensuring that our clients receive efficient legal assistance globally.
Our Company has developed over the years and through its consistent performance and cooperation successful business relations with a large number of international clients and is a member to various business associations such as the European Collectors Association (ECA), International Association of Commercial Collectors (IACC), Federation of European National Collection Associations (FENCA), League International for Creditors (LIC), EuroCollectNet Lawyers (ECN), the TCM Group International, EOS Global Collection, CCI Credit Management, the Commercial Law League of America (CLLA), the Commercial Bar, the General Bar, the Commercial Law Leage of America and the American Lawyers Company.

Name: EL GHAYESH
Description:
مؤسسة الغايش للاستشارات القانونية وأعمال المحاماة وتحصيل الديون لصالح الغير
Elghayesh Foundation For Consulting And Legal Acts

تأسست مؤسسة الغايش عام 1997 على يد الأستاذ/ أحمد عبد الفتاح الغايش، محامٍ بالنقض والدستورية والإدارية العليا، كمؤسسة متخصصة في تقديم الاستشارات القانونية وأعمال المحاماة، وتمكنت خلال مسيرتها من بناء سمعة متميزة كأحد أبرز مراكز المحاماة بالقاهرة.

وفي عام 2015، توسعت المؤسسة لتشمل تحصيل الديون لصالح الغير، مستفيدة من خبرتها القانونية الواسعة وشبكة علاقاتها المؤسسية، لتلبي احتياجات عملائها من الأفراد والشركات المحلية والدولية، والبنوك الاستثمارية.

خدمات المؤسسة:
	•	الاستشارات القانونية المتخصصة في المجالات المدنية، التجارية، العقارية، والمصرفية.
	•	تمثيل قانوني شامل أمام مختلف درجات المحاكم، بما فيها محكمة النقض والدستورية والإدارية العليا.
	•	تحصيل ديون البنوك والشركات من العملاء المتعثرين.
	•	التفاوض وتنظيم التسويات القانونية والمالية.
	•	تنفيذ الأحكام القضائية وملاحقة المحكوم ضدهم بالتعاون مع الجهات الرسمية.

من أبرز عملائنا في القطاع البنكي:
	•	البنك الأهلي الكويتي (ABK) – مصر
	•	بنك المشرق
	•	بنك أبو ظبي التجاري
	•	بنك الكويت الوطني
	•	البنك الزراعي المصري
	•	بنك SAIB

وفي القطاع الخاص والتجاري:
	•	مجموعة ماجد الفطيم
	•	سيتي سنتر ألماظة
	•	الأهلي كابيتال للتأجير التمويلي

تعتمد المؤسسة على فريق متكامل من المحامين، المستشارين، المحصلين، والمحللين الماليين، يجمعهم هدف مشترك: تحقيق أفضل النتائج القانونية والتجارية لصالح العملاء، وفق أعلى معايير الاحترافية والالتزام

• Rebaja de provisiones.
• Limpiar Estado de Resultado Contable y Financiero.
• Liberar Recursos Humanos para optimizar su gestión 
   interna.

Name: Tape Creative Agency
Description:
Tape Creative Agency stands at the forefront of innovation, offering unparalleled insights and support to brands seeking to engage with African consumers and communities nationwide. Our agency harnesses the power of tailored, culturally resonant strategies and cutting-edge visual creatives to craft authentic connections that transcend borders.

With a deep-rooted understanding of the African market and its intricate cultural tapestry, Tape is uniquely positioned to cater to the diverse needs of businesses aiming to extend their footprint across local cities, townships, and rural areas. Our comprehensive suite of services spans market research, consumer behaviour insights, bespoke creative strategies, and dynamic content visual production, all meticulously crafted to help businesses establish a compelling presence within the African consumer landscape.

Moreover, Tape is not merely an agency; it is a community-driven force dedicated to uplifting local talent and fostering collaboration among African creatives. By providing platforms for showcasing talent and facilitating meanin

With a deep understanding of the African market and cultural nuances, Tape is able to tailor its services to meet the needs of businesses looking to expand their reach in the local cities, townships and rural regions. This includes a wide range of services such as market insights, consumer behaviour, brand positioning, marketing strategy, production and content creation, all of which are designed to help businesses establish a strong presence for their African consumer. 

In addition, through its community, Tape is committed to supporting local talent and empowering African creatives by providing them with opportunities to showcase their work and collaborate with businesses in the region. Through its innovative and collaborative approach, Tape is changing the way businesses connect with African consumers from local communities, driving growth and innovation in the region's creative industry.

Name: G-COB BUSINESS | Soluções Jurídicas e Estratégicas em Cobrança para Empresas
Description:
Na G-COB BUSINESS, não apenas resolvemos desafios financeiros – nós assumimos a sua causa. Atuamos com inteligência e estratégia para recuperação de crédito, cobrança empresarial, gestão de contratos e recuperação tributária, oferecendo soluções eficazes para médias e grandes empresas que precisam garantir segurança financeira e crescimento sustentável.

Com uma abordagem estratégica e personalizada, nossa missão é ajudar empresas dos setores de construção civil, serviços e educação a reduzir inadimplência, otimizar contratos e garantir conformidade legal.

O que nos diferencia?
 Expertise Comprovada: Nossa equipe tem anos de experiência em cobrança macro e recuperação de créditos, sempre com estratégias eficientes e ética profissional.
 Abordagem Estratégica: Trabalhamos para maximizar a recuperação de dívidas sem comprometer o relacionamento comercial dos clientes.
 Resultados Mensuráveis: Empresas que trabalham conosco reduzem inadimplência, otimizam seu fluxo de caixa e protegem seus ativos.
 Tecnologia e Inovação: Aplicamos análise de dados e automação de processos para aumentar a eficiência da cobrança.
 Compromisso com a Excelência: Tratamos cada caso como único, garantindo transparência, ética e soluções assertivas.

Ao longo dos anos, ajudamos diversas empresas a recuperar milhões em créditos, evitando perdas financeiras e promovendo uma gestão mais eficiente.

 Sua empresa precisa de soluções estratégicas para cobranças, contratos ou recuperação tributária?
Entre em contato e descubra como podemos ajudar a proteger e fortalecer o futuro do seu negócio.

 Fale com a G-COB BUSINESS e transforme desafios financeiros em oportunidades.

Name: Chau Deudas Uruguay

En ChauDeudas, ayudamos a quienes necesitan reorganizar sus compromisos pendientes con empresas financieras, de cable, telefonía, seguros, tarjetas de crédito u otros servicios. Queremos que ponerse al día sea un paso concreto hacia una vida económica más ordenada y saludable.

Para las empresas, ChauDeudas es un aliado que mejora la experiencia de sus clientes, ofrece alternativas de pago más flexibles y complementa sus procesos de cobranza con un modelo digital ágil, moderno y eficiente.

Cuando las personas acceden a información clara y a soluciones reales, todos ganan:

 y un ecosistema financiero más saludable.

ChauDeudas. Hola Tranquilidad.

Name: RIOCOB -  RECUPERAÇÃO DE CRÉDITO
Description:
A RIOCOB é especializada em recuperação de ativos de forma extrajudicial. A empresa presta consultoria estratégica para minimizar os impactos da inadimplência no negócio e realiza a formatação de indicadores que auxiliam na tomada de decisões dos credores.
Com trabalho ético acima de tudo, a RIOCOB se coloca ao lado do empresário para definir e aplicar as melhores práticas de prevenção e recuperação de crédito.

Missão: Fornecer soluções empresariais para recuperação de crédito de alta performance, valendo-se dos melhores processos e soluções tecnológicas do mercado, garantindo os melhores resultados financeiros para os investidores e clientes, respeitando a integridade moral dos inadimplentes para recuperar a relação com o cliente. 

Visão: Sermos a melhor opção em soluções empresarias de recuperação de créditos do Sudoeste Goiano, crescendo de forma sólida, atingindo a excelência até 2023. 

Valores: Satisfação do cliente, qualidade, confiança, ética, transparência, relacionamento interpessoal e excelência. 

Principais serviços prestados:

*Pré cobrança: cobrança preventiva com envio de lembrete antes do vencimento para evitar que a inadimplência ocorra.

*Cobranças em geral: cheques, notas promissórias, duplicatas, boletos, cartões, contratos, taxas de condomínio, mensalidades escolares, etc.

*Consultoria preventiva para reduzir o percentual de inadimplência e definição de indicadores para a tomada de decisão.

As vantagens de uma empresa especializada em cobrança;

Todo acionamento ao devedor é feito de forma individual e personalizada com foco na negociação amigável, reservando a atenção e importância de cada cliente.
Os profissionais são treinados e preparados com técnicas em resolução de conflitos e negociação.
Com a terceirização, o empresário poderá direcionar todos os esforços para a gestão do negócio.

Name: Recobra Costa Rica
Description:
Recobra Soluciones | Recuperamos tu cartera, recuperas tu tranquilidad.

En Recobra Soluciones ayudamos a empresas costarricenses a enfrentar uno de los mayores retos financieros: la morosidad.
Nos especializamos en la gestión integral de cobros administrativos y judiciales, combinando tecnología, procesos legales y estrategias personalizadas para maximizar la recuperación de carteras vencidas.

Nuestra propuesta de valor se centra en:
 Recuperación efectiva de cartera: altas tasas de éxito respaldadas por casos reales.
 Transparencia total: reportes claros, comunicación constante y procesos documentados.
 Seguridad y confidencialidad: protección absoluta de datos financieros y sensibles.
 Soporte especializado: equipo con experiencia legal y tecnológica al servicio de tu negocio.

Trabajamos con empresas de todos los tamaños y sectores que buscan:

Reducir el impacto financiero de la morosidad.

Mejorar su flujo de caja y estabilidad operativa.

Proteger sus activos y minimizar riesgos legales.


En un entorno donde la morosidad crece y los deudores se vuelven cada vez más sofisticados, actuar rápido y con apoyo profesional es clave. En Recobra Soluciones convertimos los problemas de cobro en oportunidades para fortalecer la salud financiera de tu empresa.

 Contáctanos para una evaluación inicial y descubre cómo podemos ayudarte a recuperar lo que es tuyo.

Name: GYAR
Description:
GYAR nace en 1993 con un modelo de negocio basado en la  regularización de deuda, con el objetivo de generar valor añadido en la gestión de Inversión Irregular de entidades financieras.

Name: Keurmerk SVI
Description:
Als iemand een product of dienst afneemt moet daar voor betaald worden. Netjes op tijd en precies het bedrag dat is afgesproken. Zoals het hoort. Toch lukt het niet iedereen om zich aan die afspraak te houden. Steeds meer personen en bedrijven blijken niet in staat om hun betalingsverplichtingen op tijd na te komen. Dat kan een keer gebeuren en het is niet meteen een zorgelijke situatie. Er ontstaat wel een probleem wanneer iemand structureel de rekeningen niet betaalt en de schulden beginnen op te stapelen. Dat is vervelend voor degene die op het geld zit te wachten én voor degene die niet kan betalen.

Want we weten dat veel mensen met schulden gebukt gaan onder stress en gezondheidsklachten. Daarom is het zo belangrijk dat Nederland sociaal verantwoord gaat incasseren.

Laten we maar meteen duidelijk zijn: sociaal verantwoord incasseren betekent niet dat schulden worden kwijtgescholden. In tegendeel. Het is een incassomethode die er juist voor zorgt dat iemand zijn of haar financiële problemen onder ogen komt en ermee aan de slag gaat. Bij SVI zijn we ervan overtuigd dat dit wordt bereikt door duidelijk te communiceren, waar nodig een helpende hand te bieden en met elkaar in gesprek te blijven.

Niet omdat het moet, maar omdat het hoort.

Name: debtflip.io
Description:
Debtflip.io's solution to the status quo is providing a tangible service to both consumers & creditors. If we purchase a portfolio containing active bank account members, we will re-deposit their collection payments as a security deposit to support "second chance" credit opportunities, such as a secured credit card for qualified applicants.

We call this debt-flipping: the collateralization of debt recovery to create spendable credit.  

How this works:

1. After the blank charges off a portfolio of delinquent accounts, we'll purchase the portfolio at an equitable price and assume legal ownership. 

2. Outsourced collection teams are instructed to communicate debtflip.io's settlement terms to secure a zero-balance status on the account. If the account is a current bank customer, then at the customer's discretion we'll provide notice of the zero-balance and submit their payment towards a secured deposit.

3. The secured deposit can then be collateralized for "second chance" credit opportunities for the account holder. This can include locked tradelines or a secured credit card backed by their collection payments.

We require our outsourced collectors to disclose debtflip.io's authorized settlement terms. Shorter terms come with greater discount incentives, and all Debtflip-owned accounts can be settled with a one-time payment of up to 30% of the outstanding balance.

We only purchase portfolios that come with complete documentation and supporting contracts. Once we verify the debt, the documents are made available to account holders upon our initial recovery efforts. We also provide seller's agreement to demonstrate proof of ownership. If the account owner wishes to dispute we will provide the necessary channels of communication and assistance.

Outreach efforts will be non-disruptive and friendly, and interest will never be added to charged off credit-lines that we own. We request deletion of all accounts reported to the collection bureaus after receipt of payment.

Name: Western Mercantile Agency, Inc.
Description:
Western Mercantile Agency, Inc. is a nationally recognized third-party debt collection agency specializing in B2B, medical, utility, municipal, and government recovery solutions. With over 90 years of industry experience, we deliver compliant, ethical, and results-driven collections that preserve your brand reputation while improving cash flow.

Our services are fully customizable and backed by a blend of human expertise and automation, ensuring maximum recovery with minimal disruption to your operations. We serve organizations across the healthcare, government, utilities, finance, and private sectors.

 Core Services:

•	Third-Party Debt Collection (B2B & Consumer)
•	Medical & Utility Recovery
•	Pre-Collection & Early-Out Programs
•	Accounts Receivable Management
•	Bankruptcy & Probate Collections
•	Skiptracing & Asset Location
•	Contingency-Based and Outsourced Collections
•	Fully Automated Collection Solutions
•	Compliance-Centered Strategy & Execution

 Why Clients Choose Us:

•	100% U.S.-based operations
•	Fully compliant with FDCPA, HIPAA, and TCPA
•	Advanced skip tracing, AI-driven workflows, and secure data systems
•	Personalized service with real people—no scripts, no call centers
•	Proven track record of increasing recovery rates while reducing risk

We don’t just collect debts. We solve problems, recover revenue, and build lasting client partnerships. Whether you need full-service collections or targeted AR support, we bring integrity, transparency, and innovation to every engagement.

Let’s talk about how we can help you get paid faster, smarter, and more professionally.

 Contact us at contact@westernmerc.com or visit www.westernmerc.com to learn more.
